text: - 8.2 BACKUP DOCUMENTATION: All proposals for change order work are to be submitted with adequate backup information, including itemized material listing with quantities and associated cost. Labor hours by trade and rate must also be included. If labor fringes are included in hourly rates, percentages shall be indicated. Equipment costs including rates and associated time utilized must be identified. This information is to be included in all proposals whether they are deductive, additive or a combination of both. Failure to provide this backup will delay the change order processing.
